top_findings.title: Very low test coverage (5.9%) despite passing build
top_findings.evidence: scores.json: test_coverage=0.059, defect_rate=1.0. mcp_test.go:14-21 loadTestDB t.Fatalf's without data/kaggle, and that dir is absent from the archive — so the 25 data-dependent tests exercise almost no code; only the 4 pure unit tests (normalize/parse) contribute.
top_findings.suggestion: Add small fixture CSVs committed alongside tests (or embed via testdata/) so query/loader code is actually exercised independent of the external dataset.
